English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Wheeler family papers
Wheeler family.
3878
1.2 cubic feet. 1.2 cubic feet.
1811-1934. Financial and legal documents, accounts, genealogies, correspondence, writing drafts. Includes family Bible and genealogical records, financial and legal records and drafts of George Downs Wheeler's autobiography. Collection material in English 2070348
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M. Warren
Date completed:
April 1982
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, June 2003
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes a draft and revision of George Downs Wheeler's autobiography; herd records kept by Charles A. Wheeler; legal documents; family Bible records; genealogy; letters; financial records; and other family papers. Other names in the collection include W. (Mollie) Wheeler; W. A. Gregory; Charles P. Knapp; Henry M. Gregory; William Oringron; Silas Crandall; Thaddeus Mather; William Hawley; William Wheeler; Royal Wheeler; Robert Turner; James Turner; Mrs. George Hewitt; John Peters; Rachel Crandall; Addison J. Wheeler; Asa Babcock; and John Dickinson.
Cite As:
Wheeler family papers, #3878. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Genealogies. Autobiographies. Babcock, Asa. Crandall, Rachel. Crandall, Silas. Dickinson, John. Gregory, Henry M. Gregory, W. A. Hawley, William. Hewitt, George, Mrs. Knapp, Charles P. Mather, Thaddeus. Oringron, William. Peters, John. Turner, James. Turner, Robert. Wheeler, Addison J. Wheeler, Charles A. Wheeler, George Downs. Wheeler, Royal. Wheeler, W. Wheeler, William.
